title: centaurea babylonica
intro: Centaurea babylonica, also known as the 'Babylonica' or 'Lion's Beard,' is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Centaurea babylonica has been valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular treatment for various health issues. Its medicinal properties have been attributed to its ability to reduce swelling, fight infections, and soothe digestive issues, resulting in health benefits such as improved circulation, reduced fever, and alleviated symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
